title: Storm Spawner
description: This is an addon for Protomanlys Weather that spawns a supercell on certain events.
body:
**use mod responsibly. i am not liable for any damages that may occurr to your pc or burned down house**
### before you ask
- yes you can put this in your public modpacks
- yes you can use this in your videos
- yes

This mod spawns a supercell whenever anyone crafts an item.
**(this mod requires players to be OP to work)**

This mod was inspired by Natopowers video, "Minecraft, but a TORNADO spawns EVERY TIME we craft".

## How to use:
only works for players with OP
use command **/StormSpawner <_Mode_> <_Active_>** to change what modes are active

## Current modes
1. **crafting**
     _spawns a storm when an item is crafted_
2. **jumping**
     _spawns a storm when a player jumps_
3. **inventory**
     _spawns a storm when a player opens their inevntory (thanks NatoPower for the request to add this)_
4. **damage**
     _spawns a storm when a player takes damage_
5. **chat**
     _spawns a storm when a player sends a chat message_
6. **cyclone**
     _spawns cyclones instead of supercells_

Requirements:
[ProtoManly's Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/protomanlys-weather)

Questions/Suggestions:
`minecraftedgaming` on discord



Credits:

Minecrafted Gaming (owner)

SolarEverest (spellchecking the word storm)
